positive: A minimalist celestial bear silhouette sitting calmly on a crescent moon, surrounded by glowing abstract nebulae and subtle constellations. The bear is rendered in deep indigo and black tones, contrasting sharply against a vibrant teal and gold starry background. Clean line art quality combined with highly detailed watercolor galaxy textures. Strong central composition, highly stylized, perfect for apparel printing. --ar 1:1
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, grain, noise, poor anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, cropped, ugly, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, bad composition, vibrant skin tones
